title: calamagrostis littorea var. major
intro: Calamagrostis littorea var. major, also known as sea fescue, is a type of grass that is native to coastal areas and is characterized by its tall, slender stems and feathery plumes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of sea fescue include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Sea fescue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
